hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = d.get('command', '')
blocked = ['git commit', 'git push']
if any(b in cmd for b in blocked):
    print('BLOCKED: Git commits and pushes are not allowed. Show the diff and wait for explicit user instruction.', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
"
